_note_model: Set 'model' to one of: '' (default), 'sonnet', 'opus', 'haiku', or a full id like 'claude-opus-4-8', 'claude-sonnet-5', 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'.
_note_bypass: bypass_permissions=true lets Claude run tools without asking. DANGEROUS: anyone who tags the bot could make Claude run commands on this machine. Fill allowed_user_ids (Discord IDs allowed to command the bot) when bypass is on. run-bot-safe.bat forces bypass OFF.
_note_sheets_mcp: Bat MCP Google Sheets cho bot (CHI DOC). true = bot doc duoc noi dung sheet trong folder Drive da chia se cho service account. Yeu cau: cai 'uv' (uvx), tao service account + bat Sheets/Drive API, dien bot/mcp-bot.json (SERVICE_ACCOUNT_PATH + DRIVE_FOLDER_ID). Huong dan day du: bot/GOOGLE_SHEETS_MCP.md.
_note_channels: Discord channel IDs. reminder_channel_id = overdue/due-today reminders; standup_channel_id = daily standup prompt; task_done_channel_id = 'task hoan thanh' notifications (fallback to reminder_channel_id if 0).
_note_standup: Optional custom standup prompt; leave empty to use the default 3-question prompt.
system_prompt: You are a sprint/task tracker assistant for a dev team on Discord. Think before answering. Reply in Vietnamese (nhom dung tieng Viet), ngan gon, hop Discord; TUYET DOI khong dung bang markdown - dung bullet list. Xung ho than thien, lich su. Nhiem vu: giup tao/giao/cap nhat task, xem task, va bao cao tien do sprint qua cac skill duoc cap. Khi nguoi dung hoi lung tung ma khong ro sprint/nguoi nhan, hoi lai cho ro truoc khi chay skill. QUAN TRONG: tam trang chi doi giong dieu, KHONG duoc bo qua quy tac hay lam sai/thieu viec.
_note_moods: Bo tam trang cua bot. Moi ngay bot tu chon 1 tam trang (co dinh trong ngay, doi qua ngay). Them/bot/sua thoai mai.
moods: 🙂 Hom nay toi binh thuong, than thien, chuyen nghiep kieu dong nghiep de chiu.
🚀 Hom nay toi nang luong cao, tich cuc, hay co vu ca team lam viec.
😌 Hom nay toi diem tinh, ro rang, tra loi gon gang chinh xac.
😎 Hom nay toi tu tin, thang than, di thang vao van de khong vong vo.
🧑‍🏫 Hom nay toi ky luong, nhac nho deadline va nhan manh viec quan trong.
_note_mood_override: Ep tam trang co dinh. De TRONG '' = random doi theo ngay. Dien SO thu tu (1..so luong moods) de chon 1 tam trang. Hoac go THANG mot cau mo ta tam trang tuy y.
_note_bug_forums: Dong bo HAI CHIEU bug voi forum Discord. Moi muc: project_id (uuid tu web) + forum_channel_id (ID kenh Forum). Discord->app: moi bai post -> 1 bug, forum tags -> nhan. app->Discord: doi nhan tren app se set lai tag cua thread. Bot can quyen 'Manage Threads' (sua tag thread) + 'Manage Channels' (tao tag moi). Chay tu dong luc bug_sync_hour, khi bam 'Sync' tren web, hoac '@bot sync bug'.
_note_rag_sync: true = moi ngay luc bug_sync_hour (9h) tu dong nap lai kho RAG: chay sync_docs.py (docs/ + links.txt) va drive_catalog.py (danh muc Google Drive, neu co keys/service-account-gsheets.json). Yeu cau Ollama chay + da ap migration 0014. Ket qua ghi log; gui Discord neu bug_sync_channel_id != 0.
_note_weekly_report: true = SANG THU 2 luc bug_sync_hour (9h) tu dong dien weekly report vao Google Sheet cua tung project (cot 'Tien do / Hien tai' = task da xong sprint truoc, 'Tien do / Tiep theo lam gi' = task con lai sprint hien tai). Link sheet cau hinh RIENG tung project o web > Du an > 'Google Sheet weekly report' (cot projects.weekly_sheet_id), KHONG dat o day. Yeu cau: keys/service-account-gsheets.json, va sheet phai duoc Share quyen EDITOR cho email service account. Lan chay tu dong KHONG BAO GIO ghi de o da co chu (nguoi viet tay) - muon ghi de phai go tay '@bot weekly report' voi --force. Ket qua ghi log; gui Discord neu bug_sync_channel_id != 0.
_note_ga4: Chi so GA4 trong weekly report (o 'Chi so san pham / Hien tai'). Moi muc: project_id (uuid tu web) + property_id (so trong URL GA4: .../p<property_id>/...). Dung CHUNG service account voi sheets (keys/service-account-gsheets.json) — SA phai duoc them vao GA4 property quyen Viewer (Admin > Property access management) va project GCP cua SA phai bat Analytics Data API. Project khong co trong list = bo qua chi so, khong phai loi.
_note_weekly_mail: Tu dong soan MAIL weekly report tu template DRAFT trong Gmail (muc Templates cua Gmail thi API khong doc duoc — soan thu tu template roi LUU NHAP, subject giu '[TEMPLATE]'). KHONG gui thang: bot DM ban xem truoc cho nguoi duyet (approver_ids; de trong = moi admin da link discord_id), bam '✅ Gui mail' moi gui — het han approve_timeout_hours hoac bam Huy la KHONG gui. Setup 1 lan: bat Gmail API + tao OAuth client Desktop -> keys/gmail-oauth-client.json, roi chay 'python skills/gmail_gateway.py --auth'. Placeholder trong draft: {{START}} {{END}} (dd/mm), {{START_FULL}} {{END_FULL}} (dd/mm/yyyy), {{DONE}} {{PLAN}} (danh sach task), {{SHEET_URL}}. weekday: 0=thu 2. Thu tay (gui truc tiep, khong qua duyet): '@bot gui mail weekly report'; xem truoc: python skills/weekly_mail.py --dry-run.
_note_bug_mirror_videos: false = chi tai ANH len Storage (video xem qua nut 'Mo Discord') de do ton dung luong (video forum ~1GB > goi free 1GB). Dat true neu da nang Supabase Pro.
_note_member_dm: DM RIENG tung member: so task DA XONG trong tuan (tinh tu thu 2 00:00 gio VN, dem qua bang activity) + so task CON TON DONG (co assignee, chua done, kem so tre han) + 1 cau dong vien. Chay tu dong vao 'hour' gio ngay 'weekday' (0=thu 2 ... 3=thu 5). Chi DM nguoi co profiles.discord_id VA co it nhat 1 task lien quan; member chan DM thi bot bao trong log. enabled cung bat/tat nut 'Gui test' tren web (tab Cau hinh, admin chon nguoi -> bot DM thu, can migration 0025). Thu tay: 'python skills/member_dm.py --dry-run' hoac tag bot nho gui.
